mimo_config.message0: Configure Xiaomi MiMo API Key %1 Base URL %2
mimo_config.tooltip: Configure Xiaomi MiMo AI API key and base URL

mimo_k10_audio_init.message0: Initialize K10 built-in microphone + speaker object %1 %2 sample rate %3
mimo_k10_audio_init.tooltip: Initialize the UNIHIKER K10 built-in microphone and speaker; use the same object for recording, voice chat, and playback.

mimo_i2s_speaker_init.message0: I2S speaker init object %1 %2 BCLK %3 LRCLK %4 DIN %5 sample rate %6
mimo_i2s_speaker_init.tooltip: Initialize a standard I2S speaker output object such as MAX98357A.

mimo_i2s_mic_init.message0: I2S microphone init object %1 %2 BCLK %3 LRCLK/WS %4 SD/DOUT %5 sample rate %6
mimo_i2s_mic_init.tooltip: Initialize a standard I2S microphone input object such as INMP441.

mimo_pdm_mic_init.message0: PDM microphone init object %1 %2 CLK %3 DATA %4 sample rate %5
mimo_pdm_mic_init.tooltip: Initialize a PDM microphone input object.

mimo_es8311_mic_init.message0: ES8311 microphone init object %1 %2 SDA %3 SCL %4 address %5 BCLK %6 LRCLK %7 SDOUT %8 MCLK %9 sample rate %10 gain register %11

mimo_es8311_audio_init.message0: ES8311 mic+speaker init object %1 %2 SDA %3 SCL %4 address %5 BCLK/SCLK %6 LR %7 DI/DAC in %8 DO/ADC out %9 MCK %10 sample rate %11 gain register %12 PA_EN %13
mimo_es8311_audio_init.tooltip: Initialize ES8311 microphone and speaker channels.

mimo_i2s_prompt_tone.message0: play prompt tone object %1 %2 frequency Hz %3 duration ms %4
mimo_i2s_prompt_tone.tooltip: Play a short prompt tone through the current I2S or ES8311 speaker.

mimo_i2s_record_text.message0: Xiaomi MiMo record to text microphone %1 %2 record %3 seconds %4 model %5 %6 transcription prompt(optional) %7
mimo_i2s_record_text.tooltip: Record from an I2S microphone and send it to Xiaomi MiMo audio understanding, returning text only.

mimo_i2s_asr.message0: Xiaomi MiMo speech recognition microphone %1 %2 record %3 seconds %4 language %5
mimo_i2s_asr.tooltip: Record from an I2S microphone and transcribe with mimo-v2.5-asr.

mimo_voice_chat.message0: Xiaomi MiMo voice chat microphone %1 speaker %2 %3 record %4 seconds %5 understanding model %6 voice %7 TTS model %8 beep %9 %10 prompt(optional) %11
mimo_voice_chat.tooltip: Record audio, ask Xiaomi MiMo to understand it, synthesize the answer, and play it through I2S.

mimo_chat.message0: Xiaomi AI Chat user message %1 model %2 deep thinking %3
mimo_chat.tooltip: Send message to Xiaomi MiMo AI and get response

mimo_chat_with_history.message0: Xiaomi AI Multi-turn Chat user message %1 model %2 deep thinking %3
mimo_chat_with_history.tooltip: Xiaomi MiMo AI with multi-turn conversation support

mimo_set_system_prompt.tooltip: Set the AI assistant's role and behavior rules

mimo_image_understand_url.message0: Xiaomi AI Image Understanding (URL) image URL %1 prompt %2 model %3

mimo_image_understand_base64.message0: Xiaomi AI Image Understanding (Base64) Base64 image %1 prompt %2 model %3
mimo_image_understand_base64.tooltip: Analyze images using Base64 encoded data

mimo_image_understand_capture.message0: Xiaomi AI Image Understanding (Capture) prompt %1 model %2
mimo_image_understand_capture.tooltip: Capture from camera and upload to Xiaomi AI for image understanding

mimo_audio_understand.message0: Xiaomi AI Audio Understanding audio URL %1 prompt %2 model %3

mimo_audio_understand_base64.message0: Xiaomi AI Audio Understanding (Base64) Base64 audio %1 prompt %2 model %3
mimo_audio_understand_base64.tooltip: Analyze audio using Base64 encoded data

mimo_asr_base64.message0: Xiaomi MiMo speech recognition Base64 audio %1 format %2 language %3
mimo_asr_base64.tooltip: Transcribe Base64 WAV or MP3 audio and return text.

mimo_video_understand.message0: Xiaomi AI Video Understanding video URL %1 prompt %2 fps %3 model %4
mimo_video_understand.tooltip: Analyze video using URL, with configurable frame rate

mimo_video_understand_base64.message0: Xiaomi AI Video Understanding (Base64) Base64 video %1 prompt %2 fps %3 model %4
mimo_video_understand_base64.tooltip: 通过Base64编码视频进行视频理解分析，可控制抽帧率

mimo_tts.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS text %1 voice %2 model %3
mimo_tts.tooltip: Speech synthesis with preset voice, returns Base64 encoded WAV audio

mimo_tts_with_style.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS with style text %1 voice %2 style %3 model %4
mimo_tts_with_style.tooltip: Speech synthesis with preset voice and style instructions, returns Base64 WAV

mimo_tts_voice_design.message0: Xiaomi AI Voice Design voice description %1 text %2
mimo_tts_voice_design.tooltip: Design custom voice via text description and synthesize speech, returns Base64 WAV

mimo_tts_voice_clone.message0: Xiaomi AI voice cloning sample Base64 %1 format %2 style (optional) %3 text %4
mimo_tts_voice_clone.tooltip: Clone a voice from an audio sample and return Base64 WAV audio.

mimo_play_tts.message0: Play TTS Audio I2S object %1 Base64 audio %2
mimo_play_tts.tooltip: Decode Base64 TTS audio data and play via I2S (WAV 24kHz 16bit mono)

mimo_tts_and_play.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS and Play I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3 model %4
mimo_tts_and_play.tooltip: Synthesize speech with preset voice and play directly via I2S

mimo_tts_and_play_with_style.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS and Play (with style) I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3 style %4 model %5
mimo_tts_and_play_with_style.tooltip: Synthesize speech with preset voice and style, play directly via I2S

mimo_tts_and_play_voice_design.message0: Xiaomi AI Voice Design and Play I2S object %1 voice description %2 text %3
mimo_tts_and_play_voice_design.tooltip: Design custom voice and synthesize speech, play directly via I2S

mimo_tts_and_play_voice_clone.message0: Xiaomi AI voice cloning and play I2S object %1 sample Base64 %2 format %3 style (optional) %4 text %5
mimo_tts_and_play_voice_clone.tooltip: Clone a voice, synthesize speech, and play it through I2S.

mimo_tts_stream_play.message0: Xiaomi AI Stream TTS and Play I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3
mimo_tts_stream_play.tooltip: Stream speech synthesis and play in real-time, PCM16 format, lower latency

mimo_tts_stream_play_with_style.message0: Xiaomi AI Stream TTS and Play (with style) I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3 style %4
mimo_tts_stream_play_with_style.tooltip: Stream speech synthesis with style control, play in real-time, PCM16 format

mimo_get_response_status.tooltip: Check if the last API call was successful

mimo_get_error_message.tooltip: Get the error message from the last API call

mimo_set_stream_callback.tooltip: Set stream callback function, executes on each text chunk received

mimo_get_stream_chunk.tooltip: Get current text chunk in stream callback

mimo_clear_stream_callback.tooltip: Clear the set stream callback function
